title: viola cephalonica
intro: Viola cephalonica, also known as the Greek violet, is a species of flowering plant in the viola genus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Viola cephalonica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote healthy skin. Herbal preparations of Viola cephalonica can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
